utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final coverage plan: it includes all 5 top-level items with matching names. Next, verify each is fully specified with costs as required. 1) health_coverage: The format requires 'physical and mental health insurance with costs.' The plan provides physical_health with plan name and €100/month, mental_health with €130/month, plus an emergency_mental_health add-on and a total monthly cost. This satisfies the requirement. 2) property_coverage: The format requires 'home/contents insurance with costs.' The plan includes home_contents €60/month and technology_protection €40/month, plus total monthly cost. Home/contents is covered with costs, thus satisfied. 3) travel_coverage: The format requires 'travel insurance with costs.' The plan includes basic_travel €50/month, travel_assistance €150/month, and total monthly cost. Satisfied. 4) additional_services: The format requires 'any enhancement services with costs.' The plan lists premium_medical_network €75/month, specialist_access €250/month, claims_advocacy €250 one-time fee, and total monthly cost. Satisfied. 5) total_budget: The format requires 'complete monthly/annual cost breakdown.' The plan provides monthly_cost, annual_cost, current_spending, annual_savings, company_benefit_utilization, unused_company_benefit. Satisfied. All five items are present and fully specified per the requested details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Extract items from the final coverage plan and match them to identically named options in the ground-truth ratings. For health_coverage: physical_health uses LifeFirst Standard Plan (primary_health_coverage.physical_health -> rating 8); mental_health uses PrimeCare Premium Plan (primary_health_coverage.mental_health -> rating 10); emergency_mental_health corresponds to Emergency Mental Health Care under health_enhancement_services -> rating 8. For property_coverage: home_contents uses InsurePlus Standard Coverage (property_protection.home_content -> rating 7); technology_protection matches Technology Protection under property_enhancement_services -> rating 10. For travel_coverage: basic_travel uses LifeFirst Standard Plan (mobility_coverage.travel_insurance -> rating 7); travel_assistance matches 24/7 Travel Assistance under travel_enhancement_services -> rating 10. For additional_services: premium_medical_network matches Premium Medical Network (travel_enhancement_services) -> rating 10; specialist_access matches Specialist Access (health_enhancement_services) -> rating 10; claims_advocacy matches Claims Advocacy Service (general_services) -> rating 9.
